description: Keep Epicureanism scoped to Epicurus's philosophical school and atomist/materialist lineage, not Aristotelian syllogistic logic.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to Epicurus's Garden in Athens.
The graph's existing classical material-transformation/atomist-adjacent node remains the closest available predecessor for Epicurean materialism.
Aristotelian syllogistic logic is not a direct source-backed prerequisite for Epicurus's school.
